name: Surprise Meat Loaf Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F.
2. In a bowl, combine the meat, eggplant, onion, egg, milk, oats, salt, and basil.
3. Spread the mixture into an ungreased baking pan (8 x 8 or 9 x 9 inches).
4. Bake uncovered for 45 to 50 minutes.
5. Remove excess fat after baking.
6. In a small saucepan, mix the tomatoes, garlic, cornstarch, and salt until thickened.
7. Cook and stir for 1 minute.
8. Cut the meat loaf into squares and top with the tomato sauce when serving.
Note: Any type of summer squash can be substituted for the eggplant in this recipe.
